LanguageData.JDG_BaseForgotten: {0} has finished contemplating the orb, and roused from the hourlong vigil with a smile - an almost childlike and wonderously innocent smile.\n\nMuch has been forgotten:
LanguageData.JDG_NonBiologicalRelationsForgotten: All relationships, except for blood-related kin
LanguageData.JDG_MemoriesForgotten: All memories, both good and bad
LanguageData.JDG_SkillsForgotten: {0} to {1} percent of experience in each skill
LanguageData.JDG_PassionsForgotten: Passions, with new ones taking their place
LanguageData.JDG_ContemplationHediffGained: {0} now has a tidy mind and cannot contemplate the orb again for some time.
